children.text: Use a small notice block on the home page for time-sensitive updates.

children.name: Div
children.text: This keeps the landing page academy-oriented while still surfacing new admissions updates, timetable changes, and parent briefings.

children.name: Div
children.text: Consultation intake remains open for new students.

children.name: Div
children.text: Families can request subject planning and initial level review through the consultation form.

children.name: Div
children.text: Weekly timetable updates are posted every Friday.

children.name: Div
children.text: Parents can review sample class blocks and schedule guidance on the timetable page.
